
# Changelog

## [Unreleased]

## [26.06-dev1] - 2026-06-01

### Added

- Migrate to Quarto.
- Reorganized content based on the [Diátaxis](https://diataxis.fr) guidelines.

### Fixed

- Broken links and navigation.

### Changed

- Trial tables structure.
- Questionnaire data structure.
- Match dataset structure with the behaverse dataset.

### Removed

- L1/L2 naming.
